palette.note: SNES-era warm. Chrono Trigger interiors. Harvest Moon warmth.

style_guide.character_proportions: 2.5 head-heights tall. Big expressive eyes. Simple readable silhouettes.
style_guide.tile_style: Top-down 3/4 view. Warm lighting. Visible texture. No pure black outlines.
style_guide.ui_style: Dark panels with subtle warm border. Amber accent on interactive elements.
style_guide.animation_frames: 2-4 per direction for walk. 2 for idle breathe. Personality in idle.
